title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jetking - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jetking - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
